code: export class UserStatsMessageParser{constructor(){this._health=0;this._maxHealth=0;this._energy=0;this._maxEnergy=0;this._hunger=0;this._maxHunger=0;this._xp=0;this._maxXp=0;this._strength=0;}flush(){return true;}parse(wrapper){this._health=wrapper.readInt();this._maxHealth=wrapper.readInt();this._energy=wrapper.readInt();this._maxEnergy=wrapper.readInt();this._hunger=wrapper.readInt();this._maxHunger=wrapper.readInt();this._xp=wrapper.readInt();this._maxXp=wrapper.readInt();this._strength=wrapper.readInt();return true;}get health(){return this._health;}get maxHealth(){return this._maxHealth;}get energy(){return this._energy;}get maxEnergy(){return this._maxEnergy;}get hunger(){return this._hunger;}get maxHunger(){return this._maxHunger;}get xp(){return this._xp;}get maxXp(){return this._maxXp;}get strength(){return this._strength;}}
